reviews.comment:
Excelente estación de servicio instalaciones modernas y muy buena atención especialmente destacó la limpieza del parabrisas que para quienes estamos en viaje es una bendición. Además tiene un parque espectacular muy bien mantenido con mesas y lugares para sentarse lo que invita a descansar y comer algo tranquilo.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service station with modern facilities and very good service; I especially appreciated the windshield cleaning, which is a blessing for those of us traveling. It also has a spectacular, well-maintained park with tables and seating areas, perfect for relaxing and enjoying a meal in peace.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7652943530366249800/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT21odlN6QlpaRWxNZVhVeExYaEtWMlJPWlhOUk5rRRAB

reviews.comment:
Excelente atención. Lo único que no tiene los vasos no sé por qué no se lo traen lo dejan en la Pacheco dónde no te atienden bien en dónde no compra nadie. Traigan los vasos a la ypf de la calle touch ruta 22 por favor

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service. The only thing is they don't have cups; I don't know why they don't bring them. They leave them at the Pacheco station where the service isn't good and nobody buys anything. Please bring the cups to the YPF station on Touch Street, Route 22.

reviews.comment:
Se toman todos los lunes a la madrugada 15 min para cambiar precio.. y después salen que no tienen infignia, que vendan cerveza mejor. Socio muy desconforme.

(Translated by Google)
They take 15 minutes every Monday morning to change prices... and then they say they don't have any investment, they should sell beer instead. A very disgruntled member.
